cmd:
bash -c 
cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src
git submodule update --init --recursive
export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
cmake -S . -B build-old -G Ninja   -DUSE_HIP=ON -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx1100   -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++   -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo
cmake --build build-old --target ans_test ans_statistics_test   batch_prefix_sum_test float_test gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16

bash -c 
cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src
export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
cmake -S . -B build-old -G Ninja   -DUSE_HIP=ON -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx1100   -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++   -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5   -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo
cmake --build build-old --target ans_test ans_statistics_test   batch_prefix_sum_test float_test gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16
